overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a futuristic cityscape with curved glass skyscrapers and elevated highways. The camera performs a slow orbit around a high-rise building, revealing rooftop terraces and dense urban architecture under clear afternoon skies with cool blue-teal tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of downtown commercial district with elevated highway

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the skyscraper in a clockwise direction while maintaining steady aerial perspective

entered.detail: tall building with reflective teal-tinted glass facade and curved architecture
multi-level highway structure with visible vehicle traffic
tall thin industrial chimney structure with metallic finish
illuminated commercial signs with red and white graphics
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The drone footage opens with a sweeping view of a curved glass skyscraper dominating the right foreground, while an elevated highway with sparse traffic runs along the left. The camera slowly orbits clockwise around the building, revealing the futuristic cityscape with industrial towers and neon signage under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace of commercial high-rise with city views

events.description: camera shifts focus from building facade to rooftop terrace area

agents.ego_description: continuing the orbital path around the building, now focusing on rooftop amenities

entered.detail: elevated outdoor space with greenery and landscaping on building roof
contemporary architectural structure with glass walls on the rooftop
twin chimneys emitting white smoke into the sky
transparent protective barrier along the edge of the rooftop

segments.scene_description: As the drone continues its orbit, the curved glass building moves out of frame revealing the luxurious rooftop terrace with a modern pavilion structure. Industrial smoke stacks become visible in the distance while the elevated highway remains visible but shifts position relative to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop pool deck with lounge areas overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: completing the orbital path around the building while capturing the rooftop pool and lounge amenities

entered.detail: rectangular water feature with reflective surface on the rooftop
deck chairs and seating arrangements for rooftop relaxation
rectangular containers with vegetation lining the terrace

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the rooftop swimming pool and outdoor lounge furniture as the drone completes its orbit. The camera captures the planter boxes and glass railings of the terrace while the elevated highway and industrial towers shift to the background, concluding the aerial survey of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit that transitions from a wide view of a futuristic cityscape to an intimate survey of a luxury rooftop terrace. It begins with a sweeping view of a curved glass skyscraper dominating the foreground while an elevated highway with sparse traffic runs along the left. As the camera continues its rotation, the glass building glides out of frame to reveal a modern pavilion structure and distant industrial smoke stacks under clear afternoon skies. The scene then expands to uncover a rooftop swimming pool and outdoor lounge furniture, with the camera gliding past planter boxes and glass railings. Finally, the elevated highway and industrial towers shift into the far background as the drone completes its orbit of the high-rise terrace.
